name: 粘性炸弹爆炸
description: 粘性炸弹爆炸，对周围敌人造成伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.stickyBombs || battle.extensions.stickyBombs.length === 0) return { success: false }; var triggered = false; var messages = []; for (var i = battle.extensions.stickyBombs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var bomb = battle.extensions.stickyBombs[i]; if (context.playerId === bomb.ownerPlayerId) continue; bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen = (bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen || 0) + 1; if (bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen < 1) continue; var targetX = bomb.x; var targetY = bomb.y; if (bomb.attachedPieceId) { var attachedPiece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === bomb.attachedPieceId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (attachedPiece) { targetX = attachedPiece.x; targetY = attachedPiece.y; } } var affected = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.currentHp > 0 && Math.abs(p.x - targetX) + Math.abs(p.y - targetY) <= 1; }); if (affected.length > 0) { var result = dealDamage(sourcePiece, affected, bomb.damage, 'physical', battle, 'sticky-bomb'); var hitNames = affected.map(function(t, idx) { var dmg = result.results && result.results[idx] ? result.results[idx].damage : 0; return t.name + '(-' + dmg + ')'; }); messages.push('粘性炸弹爆炸！' + hitNames.join('、')); } else { messages.push('粘性炸弹爆炸！未命中任何棋子'); } battle.extensions.stickyBombs.splice(i, 1); triggered = true; } return triggered ? { success: true, message: messages.join('，') } : { success: false }; }
